title: koeleria subcaudata
intro: Koeleria subcaudata, also known as Tufted Hair-grass, is a species of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects. Koeleria subcaudata is believed to have several health benefits, such as reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and acting as an anti-arthritic agent. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be consumed orally to harness its potential health benefits.
